projects.name: Books2Shelf
projects.subtitle: Digital Library Management Platform
projects.description: Enterprise-grade digital library management system featuring real-time search, intuitive cataloging, and comprehensive user journey mapping. Architected from concept to deployment with focus on scalability and user experience.
projects.challenge: Design an intuitive system for managing large book collections while maintaining fast performance and excellent UX across all devices.
projects.solution: Implemented React with optimized state management, created comprehensive Figma prototypes for user testing, and deployed a responsive solution with 95+ Lighthouse performance score.
impact: Achieved 40% faster search performance through optimized algorithms
100% responsive across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices
User testing showed 92% satisfaction rate with interface design
highlights: Deployed on Vercel with CI/CD pipeline

projects.name: Professional Portfolio
projects.subtitle: Personal Brand & Digital Presence
projects.description: Modern, performance-optimized portfolio platform with serverless backend integration. Features custom contact API, SEO optimization, and seamless user experience. Built to showcase projects and provide direct client communication channels.
projects.challenge: Create a fast, professional portfolio that stands out while maintaining excellent performance and providing seamless contact functionality.
projects.solution: Developed a React-based SPA with serverless API integration for contact forms, implemented comprehensive SEO strategies, and designed with a mobile-first approach using Tailwind CSS.
impact: 95% reduction in page load time vs. previous version
Successfully integrated custom domain with SSL encryption

projects.name: NIRVAN - Vedic Yoga
projects.subtitle: Wellness & Yoga Studio Website
projects.description: Comprehensive digital experience for a wellness brand, featuring complete UX design process from user research to final implementation. Documented full case study showcasing research, wireframing, prototyping, and development phases.
projects.challenge: Create a calming, accessible digital presence that reflects the studio's values while converting visitors into members and maintaining high performance.
projects.solution: Conducted extensive UX research, created high-fidelity Figma prototypes with user testing, and developed a responsive website with focus on accessibility and performance optimization.
impact: Published comprehensive UX case study on Behance
Documented complete design thinking process from research to deployment
